auth.restrictedAccess: You do not have permission to do that.

csvImport.title: Import CSV
csvImport.description: Upload a schedule or roster CSV using the existing league import pipeline.
csvImport.setupDescription: Choose the import mode, download a template, and select the CSV file you want to process.

modeDescriptions.schedule: Import league games into the master schedule using the existing backend CSV pipeline.
modeDescriptions.roster: Import players into a specific team roster using the existing backend CSV pipeline.

csvImport.rosterTeamHelp: Roster imports apply to the selected team. The CSV does not include a team column.
csvImport.noTeamsAvailable: No teams are available yet for roster import.
csvImport.validationDescription: Check the detected headers, missing required columns, and the first few rows before you submit.
csvImport.schemaDescription: Headers are matched case-insensitively, and spaces are normalized to underscores before import.
csvImport.previewEmpty: No data rows detected in this file.
csvImport.previewUnavailable: Select a CSV file to preview detected headers and sample rows.
csvImport.parseError: Unable to read this CSV file. Check the file format and try again.
csvImport.readyToImport: The selected CSV includes all required columns.

scheduleNotes.week: Required. Include the league week number shown in the source schedule.
scheduleNotes.day: Required. Include the weekday label from the schedule source.
scheduleNotes.time: Required. Accepts HH:MM or values like 9am and 9:30pm.
scheduleNotes.homeTeam: Required. Team name for the home side. It is converted to the backend home_team field during upload.
scheduleNotes.awayTeam: Required. Team name for the away side. It is converted to the backend away_team field during upload.
scheduleNotes.field: Required field or location label shown on the schedule.

rosterNotes.number: Optional integer jersey number used during matching and updates.
rosterNotes.position: Optional short position label such as SS, CF, or P.
rosterNotes.bats: Optional batting side. Common values: R, L, S.
rosterNotes.throws: Optional throwing side. Common values: R, L.

common.leagueLogoAlt: Benito Juarez Men's Baseball League logo

footer.aboutText: Chicago's Benito Juarez Men's Baseball League brings together local teams, weekly competition, and community baseball all season long.
footer.portalCopy: Schedule, standings, rosters, and league news in one place.
footer.adminCopyAuthed: Commissioner access is intentionally kept low-profile.

home.aboutText: Established in 1975, BJMBL is a competitive nonprofit amateur baseball league in the heart of La Villita neighborhood in Chicago, IL. Our league brings together talented players, passionate fans, and local families each season, creating positive engagement and pride to win!
home.loadError: Unable to load the league dashboard right now.
home.noUpcomingDescription: Upcoming matchups will appear here as soon as the schedule is posted.
home.recentResultsDescription: Latest final scores already entered into the league schedule.
home.noResultsDescription: Completed games will show here once results are posted.
home.announcementsDescription: Preview the latest updates from the official BJMBL Facebook page.
home.noAnnouncementsDescription: Recent league updates will appear here.
home.noStandingsDescription: Team records will appear after final scores are entered.
home.todayScheduleDescription: Check upcoming matchups and final scores.
home.teamRostersDescription: Browse teams, records, and player lists.
home.announcementsLinkDescription: Read the latest league updates and notices.
home.contactDescription: Reach the league for questions and league info.
home.photosDescription: Browse league photos from games and community highlights.
home.seasonNoteText: This portal is designed for quick checks at the field: schedule first, standings second, announcements close at hand, and commissioner tools available without leaving the main workflow pages.

photos.title: Photos
photos.description: Browse league photos from games, events, and community highlights throughout the season. Click any photo to view it in full size.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach the league for general questions, updates, and day-to-day league information.
contact.cardDescription: Use this page to contact the league with general questions about schedules, standings, teams, registration, or league operations. We will do our best to direct your message to the right person.
contact.methodsDescription: Email or call the league directly using the contact details below.

rules.description: The official league bylaws are embedded below.
